case_title: ZOCALO, INC. VS. FRANCISCO RECABARREN et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT RECABARREN, FRANCISCO BLUEPRINT STUDIOS RECOVER FROM CROSS DEFENDANT ZOCALO, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (4 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF ZOCALO, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2010 - JUDGMENT.
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY RECABARREN, FRANCISCO AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT ZOCALO, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-03-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT RECABARREN, FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZOCALO, INC. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RECABARREN, FRANCISCO BLUEPRINT STUDIOS DEFENDANT'S DEPOSIT WAS TRANSFERRED TO THE ASSIGNEE SUGARMAN AND COMPANY LLP, AND THEREFORE MUST BE RECOVERED FROM THE ASSIGNEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-02-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-28-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-28-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZOCALO, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT RECABARREN, FRANCISCO BLUEPRINT STUDIOS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
